channel.title: GrantOtter — Federal Funding Updates
channel.description: Aggregated weekly feed of grant opportunities and agency news from NIH, NSF, and DARPA.

item.title: Harassment Reporting by NIH Recipients: What, Who, How, Where, When, and Why
item.description: We remain committed to ensuring safe, respectful, and harassment-free research environments wherever NIH-supported research is conducted. NIH grant recipients, through their institution’s leadership, faculty, and Authorized Organizational Representatives (AORs), are essential for sustaining this commitment.

item.title: Notice of Pre-Application Technical Assistance Webinar on the NIA Expanding Research in AD/ADRD (ERA) R25 Postbaccalaureate and Summer Research Education Programs
item.description: Notice NOT-AG-26-004 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: ICorpsatNIH An Entrepreneurship Program to Support Commercialization Training for Phase I SBIR/STTR awardees
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-037 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Learn Your Letters (of Reference or Support)
item.description: Get an overview of reference letters and letters of support: when to use them, who writes them, and what key information you should include for reviewers and NIH staff.

item.title: Feedback Wanted - Developing the NIH-Wide Strategic Plan for Fiscal Years 2027-2031
item.description: NIH seeks community feedback through two webinars on the next agency-wide strategic plan. This plan will guide our work over the next five years to fulfill our mission for the American people. Input from the research community, stakeholders, and the public is essential to ensure transparency in what we do and advance the principles of gold standard science that we all apply to our daily work.

item.title: Notice of Correction to Notice of Temporary Extension of Eligibility for the NIH Pathway to Independence Award (K99/R00) (NOT-OD-26-021)
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-042 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Change to PAR-24-272 Clinical and Translational Science Award (UM1 Clinical Trial Optional) in Award Information
item.description: Notice NOT-TR-26-003 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Office-wide BAA: MTO
item.description: This announcement seeks revolutionary research ideas for topics not being addressed by ongoing MTO programs or other published solicitations. | See MTO

item.title: Notice of Change to Key Dates for PAR-25-049: NIH SIREN Neurologic Clinical Trials (UG3/UH3 - Clinical Trial Required)
item.description: Notice NOT-NS-26-027 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Make a Perfect Pair with NIH Matchmaker
item.description: Our Matchmaker tool in RePORTER can help you determine which institute or center may be interested in your idea, which NIH program official you may want to contact, and which study section you might suggest for application review.

item.title: Upgrading biomass waste into strategic materials
item.description: The Fleetwood program aims to produce critical chemicals from widely available domestic resources.
